basic_details.job_title: BSSA Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 17 Doctor, Yoga Instructor and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Bihar State Sports Authority (BSSA) - Autonomous body under Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Department, Govt. of Bihar
basic_details.post_name: Various Sports Science & Support Staff posts
basic_details.short_information: BSSA is recruiting 17 contractual posts across 11 designations at KISCE, Rajgir, Bihar; last date 21 June 2026.

important_dates.interview_date: To be notified to shortlisted candidates via email

selection_process: Stage 1 Shortlisting based on scoring criteria (education, experience, sports establishment experience, certifications, sports achievements as applicable per post)
Stage 2 Interview (50 or 100 marks depending on the post)
Final Selection Based on interview performance and verification of documents

Note: Fulfillment of eligibility criteria does not guarantee a call for interview. Only shortlisted candidates will be invited. Candidates applying for more than one post will be interviewed only once. Candidature is purely provisional at all stages. Original certificates must be produced at the time of joining; failure to do so will lead to cancellation.
how_to_apply: Only online applications are accepted. No other mode will be entertained.
Register and fill the online application form for the desired post.
Upload a duly signed application form along with self-attested copies of all relevant educational qualification certificates, experience certificates, and supporting documents.
Submit the application before 21-06-2026 at 11:59 PM.
Keep the registered email ID active - call letters for interview will be communicated electronically only.
Note: Any variation in details provided in the application and documents submitted will lead to rejection of candidature.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Bihar State Sports Authority KISCE Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of online applications is 21 June 2026 at 11:59 PM at https://coach.biharsports.org/. Candidates are advised to apply well before the closing date. Applications received after the last date will not be considered.

faq.question: Q2. How many posts are available in Bihar State Sports Authority KISCE Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 16 posts are available across 11 designations — High Performance Director (1), Physiologist Grade 2 (1), Physiologist Grade 1 (1), Nutritionist (1), Masseuse (3), Strength & Conditioning Lead (1), Strength & Conditioning Expert (1), Psychologist (1), Physiotherapist (3), Young Professional (1), Doctor (1), Nursing Assistant (1), and Yoga Instructor (1). The number of vacancies and place of deployment may vary as per workload.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for High Performance Director at BSSA KISCE 2026?
faq.answer: Performance Director will receive a remuneration of ₹1,00,000 to ₹1,50,000 per month on contractual basis. For other posts, salaries range from ₹25,000 (Nursing Assistant/Yoga Instructor) to ₹1,00,000 (Doctor/S&C Lead/Nutritionist) per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the contract tenure for BSSA KISCE Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The contractual engagement is for an initial period of 2 years, extendable annually for up to 3 additional years (2+1+1+1) subject to satisfactory performance and periodic review. The maximum tenure shall not exceed 5 years and shall remain coterminous with the Khelo India Scheme.

faq.question: Q5. What is the eligibility for the Physiotherapist post in BSSA KISCE Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Master's degree in Physiotherapy from any recognized Indian or Foreign University with a minimum of 3 years of work experience as a Physiotherapist. Specialization in Sports Science carries the maximum shortlisting marks. The upper age limit is 45 years as on the closing date.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be shortlisted for interview in BSSA KISCE Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates will be shortlisted based on a scoring system that considers higher educational qualifications, total work experience, work experience in sports establishments, certifications, sports achievements (where applicable), and percentage of marks obtained. Only shortlisted candidates will be invited for the interview via their registered email ID.
